Interface ITemporalWorkspaceStatistics2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to properties and methods needed to manage message rate statistics in workspace.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F5677CCF-E3D7-4B9A-8803-670895AA262F")]
public interface ITemporalWorkspaceStatistics2 : ITemporalWorkspaceStatistics
